word: G1768 - ἐννενηκονταεννέα - ennenēkontaennéa - en-nen-ay-kon-tah-en-neh'-ah - Ninety and nine

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐννενηκονταεννέα

- Transliteration: Ennenekontaennea

- Phonetic: en-nen-ay-kon-tah-en-neh'-ah

- Definition:

1. ninety nine

- Origin: "from a (tenth) multiple of G1767">1767) and 1767 itself"

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun

- Strong's: From a (tenth) multiple of G1767 and G1767 itself; ninety nine: - ninety and nine.
